title: What's This? My Heart Is Pounding
overview: Tired of being overshadowed, Kuromi steals precious ingredients from her rival. My Melody ventures into the forest and stumbles upon a strange discovery.

title: Fluffy and Soft
overview: Up in the clouds, My Melody has an ominous encounter with a giant, fluffy bear. Back in Mariland, Flat encourages her to join the upcoming sweets contest.

title: Kuromi's Great Recipe Heist
overview: My Melody's new creation is delightfully light and airy with a satisfying crunch. Unhappy with her own recipes, Kuromi sneaks into her rival's home.

title: Honey Car Chase!
overview: Everyone loves My Melody's new cupcakes, but mean online reviews upset her. Determined to uncover her baking secrets, Tanba and Sasage chase her down.

title: The Sweets Contest Begins
overview: Ready, set... bake! My Melody, Flat and Piano impress the crowd with their teamwork. Can Kuromi steal the spotlight with her wild creation?

title: The Secret of Kuromi's Dorayaki
overview: Kuromi's wildest dreams have come true! She's now the most popular patissier in Mariland. But Mr. Pistachio's help might be a recipe for trouble...

title: What Should I Do?
overview: Chased into the forest by ravenous villagers, My Melody and Kuromi find themselves in a jam — until a thunderous voice comes to their rescue.

title: Time for Teamwork
overview: As My Melody faces her home and town in ruins, Tanba and Sasage get punished for coming clean about their past. Kuromi turns to her friend for help.

title: To the Cloud Kingdom!
overview: Amidst the rubble, My Melody shares her honest feelings with Kuromi. They decide to return to the Cloud Kingdom together to set things right.

title: Pistachio's Past
overview: While Flat and Piano continue researching the Cloud Kingdom's history and the tragedy that befell it, My Melody and Kuromi confront Pistachio.

title: All for Our Best Friend
overview: Kuromi desperately tries to awaken My Melody while Pistachio moves forward with his plan. But things turn sour as an uncontrollable rot spreads.

title: My Melody & Kuromi
overview: For three days, My Melody's friends struggle to stay awake, watching over her as she dreams of her Mama's words of wisdom. Will Mariland be saved in time?
